│ ✻ Claude Code v2.1.152                              │

│   /opt/lit-platform                                │
╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

 Tips for getting started:
  • Ask questions about your codebase
  • Make changes to files
  • Run terminal commands

❯ What is this project?

● This is the LIT Platform, a workspace for AI-powered development. The project
  includes several components:

  - **lit-lib** — Python package with ML engine and agentic layer
  - **lit-server** — Angular frontend
  - **lit-monitor** — Terminal session management daemon
  - **scripts/** — Deployment and utility scripts

  The platform connects AI CLI tools (like Claude Code) to a web-based workspace
  with channels, persistence, and collaboration features.

✻ 3.2s (12.3k↓ tokens, 847↑ tokens)
